name: Hak Lin Chang
original_name: หักลิ้นช้าง
overview: Dan NiraLai, an ex-detective from the Bravo Team- a secret government organization. Dan Niralai was pulled in to aid in unmasking an evil organization and taking down Prab Punyobat; a famous politician who had wrongly used his powers and is the person behind an international drug trafficking ring.

trailers.title: ขอบคุณ Ost.หักลิ้นช้าง | วีรยา ดำรงค์ศรี [Official MV]
